title: screenshot: smart multi-grap compositing with painter's algorithm
desc: Per-target PrintWindow+CopyFromScreen compositing, back-to-front Z-order, transparency mask outside targets. Ambiguous grap shows merged ranked find output. Grap required -- token-efficient auto-crop.
steps: Grap args required (no-args = usage + exit 1). Auto-crops to exact target regions.

Each grap resolved via WindowFinder: MUST match EXACTLY 1 window. If ANY grap ambiguous (2+ matches): merged ranked output across ALL graps, sorted by Coverage*0.6 + (1/(1+zHops))*0.4, BEST/AMB tags with [grap:...] label, exit 2.
Phase 1 per target: TryPrintWindowOnly(PW_RENDERFULLCONTENT) -- focusless, works even if occluded by other windows
Phase 2 GPU-blank targets only: SuppressBlockingWindows alpha=0 (30ms settle), CaptureScreenRegion per target, restore. Root ancestors of child targets never suppressed.
Phase 3 compositing: OrderTargetsBackToFront via GW_HWNDPREV hop count (painter's algorithm) -> DrawImage back-to-front into union bbox
Masking: pixels outside ALL target rects -> 0x00000000 (BGRA all zero, fully transparent)

a11y screenshot multi-node: grap resolves UIA elements (BoundingRectangle), groups by root window, processes windows front-to-back. Per window: suppress all windows above (SetLayeredWindowAttributes alpha=0, 30ms settle), PrintWindow/CaptureScreenRegion, crop to element BoundingRectangle, restore alpha. Composite all crops back-to-front into union bbox. Mask pixels outside ALL target rects. Falls back to full window if BoundingRectangle unavailable.

requirements.expect: composites both back-to-front, pixels outside rects = 0x00000000 transparent
exit 2, BEST/AMB ranked list sorted by Coverage*0.6+zScore*0.4 with [grap:...] tags
non-target blocking windows suppressed alpha=0 before CaptureScreenRegion, restored after
GA_ROOT ancestors not suppressed, Z-order preserved
usage printed exit 1 -- full screen forbidden (token noise)

author: claude
